issues.title: Allow AdvisedRequest to update ChatOptions (HttpHeaders)
issues.body:
**Context**
We need a way to update HTTP Headers of the ChatClient Request in an elegant way. There are options to do that using `ClientHttpRequestInterceptor` (RestClient & RestTemplate) and `ExchangeFilterFunction` for WebClients. We have to implement multiple methods to achieve a common goal. 

**Expected Behavior**
Using Advisors to elegantly modify HTTP Headers per request. 

**Current Behavior**
Today Advisors cannot update ChatOptions. They can update only Context object - which is outside ChatOptions.

comments.body: Nevermind, found a sample [here](https://github.com/the-sloth-dev/jarvis/blob/dd1513f2409192167b8246e1a80952614ee900eb/src/main/java/dev/thesloth/jarvis/advisors/UserContextAdvisor.java).  Closing this issue. Thanks
